tests.name: extension/export/symbols/build/paths sorts file-backed items by file path without mutating the input array
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves exact export file paths after normalizing path separators
extension/export/symbols/build/paths prefers an exact export-path match over a suffix-only candidate
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves nested absolute paths to the exported path suffix and falls back to normalized paths
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade re-exports the underlying facade helpers
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getGraph returns the graph from the getter
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getNode returns the node with the given id
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getNode returns null when the node does not exist
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getNeighbors returns nodes connected via outgoing edges
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getNeighbors returns nodes connected via incoming edges
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getNeighbors returns empty array for a node with no connections
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getEdgesFor returns edges where the node is the source
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getEdgesFor returns edges where the node is the target
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getEdgesFor returns empty array for a node with no edges
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getIncomingEdges returns only edges where the node is the target
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getOutgoingEdges returns only edges where the node is the source
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade filterEdgesByKind returns only edges matching the requested kinds
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade getSubgraph returns an induced subgraph around the seed node for the requested hop depth
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade findPath returns the shortest node path when a route exists
core/plugins/graphQuery/facade findPath returns null when no path exists
core/plugins/graphQuery/edges returns incoming, outgoing, and all edges for a node
core/plugins/graphQuery/edges returns empty arrays when the node is missing
core/plugins/graphQuery/edges filters edges by one or more kinds
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns an induced subgraph around a seed node
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns an empty subgraph for missing nodes or negative hops
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns only the seed node when hops is zero
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns the shortest directed path when reachable
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns the start node when the source and target match
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal skips already visited nodes when the graph contains a cycle
core/plugins/graphQuery/traversal returns a subgraph without duplicating nodes in a cycle
pathMatching keeps the expected default exclude patterns
pathMatching normalizes windows path separators
pathMatching matches nested files when using basename patterns
pathMatching matches hidden files when dot matching is enabled
pathMatching matches windows-style paths against forward-slash patterns
pathMatching skips exact node_modules and git directories
pathMatching skips nested node_modules and git directories
pathMatching does not skip similarly named directories
core/plugins/graphQuery/nodes returns the graph snapshot and looks up nodes
core/plugins/graphQuery/nodes returns neighbors connected by incoming or outgoing edges
pipeline/service/paths returns workspace-relative paths for absolute and workspace-relative file paths
pipeline/service/paths normalizes backslashes and rejects empty or out-of-workspace paths
pipeline/service/paths reads analysis file contents in order and preserves the path metadata
core/plugins/graphQuery/subgraph returns an empty graph for missing nodes or negative hops
core/plugins/graphQuery/subgraph returns the induced subgraph around the requested node
core/plugins/graphQuery/cache indexes only edges whose endpoints exist in the graph
core/plugins/graphQuery/cache returns indexed edges by key and ignores missing ones
core/plugins/graphQuery/cache reuses the cached index for the same graph object
core/plugins/graphQuery/path returns null when either endpoint is missing
core/plugins/graphQuery/path returns null when no directed path exists
core/plugins/graphQuery/path returns the path nodes when reachable
core/plugins/graphQuery/path returns the starting node when the source and target are the same
core/plugins/graphQuery/path handles cycles without revisiting nodes indefinitely
gitHistory/cache/paths returns null paths when storage is unavailable
gitHistory/cache/paths builds cache directory and file paths from the storage uri
